user.title: Connect DJI Romo
user.description: Paste the full `.env` or `dji_credentials.txt` output from the DJI Home credential extractor, or enter the DJI user token manually.

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh DJI Romo credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Paste fresh extractor output or enter a new DJI user token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to DJI Home.
error.cannot_discover_device: Token is valid, but the robot could not be auto-discovered. Enter the device serial number manually.
error.missing_token: Paste extractor output or enter a DJI user token.
error.wrong_device: These credentials are for a different DJI Romo.

init.title: Advanced settings
init.description: Adjust MQTT topics or command mappings if DJI uses different method names on your robot.

auth_failed.title: DJI Romo authentication failed
auth_failed.description: The DJI Home user token is invalid or expired. Extract fresh credentials from the DJI Home app and reconfigure the DJI Romo integration. You can paste the full `.env` or `dji_credentials.txt` output. Error: {error}
